scripts.stack:dev: cd deploy && docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.stack:dev:down: cd deploy && docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.stack:dev:logs: cd deploy && docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f --tail=200
scripts.stack:dev:config: cd deploy && docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml config
scripts.lint: npm --prefix app run lint -w webapp && cd backend && go test ./...
